name: Closed GPU spec
input: A GPU optimization spec has shipped with benchmark evidence.
expected_behavior: Rewrites build steps into rationale, preserves profiler/benchmark provenance, and points to code/tests.

name: QEC experiment spec
input: A QEC decoder experiment changed assumptions during implementation.
expected_behavior: Records final assumptions, logical observables, detector semantics, evidence, and dropped alternatives.

name: Unfinished spec
input: Some slices remain red or unverified.
expected_behavior: Refuses to close as done and identifies the remaining gates or decisions.
